author: samcm
content:
Hey all, we have some initial Glamsterdam Xatu tables now available! The list is here: https://ethpandaops.io/data/xatu/forks/glamsterdam/

These are primarily accessible via `panda`. Coverage is a little spotty for devnet-6, but we're expecting 100% for devnet-7. If there are any other events you'd like to see pls let me know 🙏
